jobs.title: Frontend Engineer
jobs.description: Frontend Engineer Hunar.AI Bengaluru, Karnataka, India 21 hours ago Over 200 applicants See who Hunar.AI has hired for this role Apply Save Report this job Hunar is seeking a skilled Frontend Software Engineer (SDE-1 level) to maintain and enhance our web-based frontend systems and tools, ensuring an exceptional user experience. In this role, you’ll collaborate closely with our development and design teams to transform interface designs into functional, responsive, and seamless user interfaces integrated with server-side features. Company Description At Hunar.AI, our vision is to build purpose-driven solutions that empower manpower-intensive organisations to hire and manage their talent more efficiently and effectively. We're committed to innovating the way companies connect with talent, focusing on making high-volume hiring simpler, faster, and more reliable. Role Description This full-time, hybrid position is based in Bengaluru. As a Frontend Developer, you will design and implement user interfaces for web applications, ensuring they are responsive, efficient, and deliver a smooth user experience. Key Responsibilities Develop and implement user-facing features using frameworks such as React.js, Material UI, Next.js, or React Native, Storybook. Ensure the technical feasibility of designs created by the UI/UX team. Optimize applications for speed, scalability, and responsiveness. Work collaboratively with team members and stakeholders to achieve project goals. Participate in code reviews, team discussions, and contribute to technical documentation. Lead specific modules or projects, overseeing the design, implementation, launch, and operational phases. Continuously learn and adapt to new technologies with guidance from senior developers. Requirements At least 2-4 years of experience in React.js, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS, Material UI and modern JavaScript frameworks (e.g., React Native). A bachelor's degree in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience. Strong understanding of the modern frontend development ecosystem, including bundling, linting, testing, and deployment tools. Experience with testing frameworks like Jest, Cypress, Mocha, or Chai. Proficiency in the JavaScript language and its broader ecosystem. Hands-on experience in building scalable frontend applications. Familiarity with Agile methodologies in software development. A commitment to writing long-lasting, maintainable code. Proven ability to design and build medium-to-large software systems with significant scope and complexity. Preferred Qualifications Expertise in front-end development, responsive web design, and overall web development. Experience creating user-centric, intuitive web interfaces. Proficiency in translating design prototypes, wireframes, and user stories into functional applications. Demonstrates a strong focus on customer satisfaction, a sense of ownership, and the ability to work with urgency. Knowledge of software development best practices, including Agile workflows, code reviews, and unit testing. Familiarity with web service technologies like REST, HTTP, and JSON. Solid understanding of professional software engineering practices, including coding standards, testing, source control management, and build processes. Strong communication skills for engaging with users, technical teams, and stakeholders to gather requirements and define technical designs. Show more Show less Seniority level Entry level Employment type Full-time Job function Engineering and Information Technology Industries Technology, Information and Internet Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Hunar.AI by 2x See who you know

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: Software Engineer Docusign Bengaluru, Karnataka, India 13 hours ago Over 200 applicants See who Docusign has hired for this role Apply Join or sign in to find your next job Join to apply for the Software Engineer role at Docusign Email or phone Password Show Forgot password? Sign in Sign in with Email or New to LinkedIn? Join now By clicking Continue to join or sign in, you agree to LinkedIn’s User Agreement , Privacy Policy , and Cookie Policy . Save Report this job Company Overview Docusign brings agreements to life. Over 1.5 million customers and more than a billion people in over 180 countries use Docusign solutions to accelerate the process of doing business and simplify people’s lives. With intelligent agreement management, Docusign unleashes business-critical data that is trapped inside of documents. Until now, these were disconnected from business systems of record, costing businesses time, money, and opportunity. Using Docusign’s Intelligent Agreement Management platform, companies can create, commit, and manage agreements with solutions created by the #1 company in e-signature and contract lifecycle management (CLM). What you'll do As a Software Engineer on the Agreement Desk team, you will work with various technologies to develop and maintain code for a Platform which helps in creating and managing Requests in agreement space. A successful person in this role will have a flexible attitude combined with an aptitude for interacting with cross functional teams to learn and deliver. This position is an individual contributor role reporting to the Senior Manager of Engineering. Responsibility Write clean, high-quality, maintainable, and testable code, primarily using React and C# Develop within an Agile/Scrum framework, leveraging tools such as automated unit testing, CI/CD pipelines, code reviews, and version control (Git) Identify and raise issues proactively that could impact delivery timelines Work in SQL, Backend Services, REST API, Azure stack Work with Project Management and other developers to understand design requirements and provide estimates for development Fix production issues and maintain the code as needed Job Designation Hybrid: Employee divides their time between in-office and remote work. Access to an office location is required. (Frequency: Minimum 2 days per week; may vary by team but will be weekly in-office expectation) Positions at Docusign are assigned a job designation of either In Office, Hybrid or Remote and are specific to the role/job. Preferred job designations are not guaranteed when changing positions within Docusign. Docusign reserves the right to change a position's job designation depending on business needs and as permitted by local law. What you bring Basic 5+ years of related experience with a Bachelor’s degree or 3+ years related experience with a Master’s degree or a PhD without experience or equivalent experience Experience working in an agile development environment Proficiency in modern server- side development using modern programming languages like .NET (our preferred platform), JVM(Java/Scala), NodeJS, or others Experience with NoSQL and SQL Experience working with scalable microservices Experience making improvements to existing large code base Experience using Git or other version control systems Fluency in English both verbal and written Preferred Practical experience with any Cloud technologies: Azure, AWS, etc Experience working with Azure stack such as Cosmos DB, Service Bus, Event Hub Experience with Kubernetes, Docker or other containerization technologies Excellent problem-solving skills Ability to learn and curious about new technologies and tool sets Experience working for a SaaS company Experience working independently and in team environment as needed A track record of being a self-starter - Individual/team responsibility is our main driver in the development work Experience with React/Typescript Focus on writing high quality code that is easy to maintain and read by others Life at Docusign Working here Docusign is committed to building trust and making the world more agreeable for our employees, customers and the communities in which we live and work. You can count on us to listen, be honest, and try our best to do what’s right, every day. At Docusign, everything is equal. We each have a responsibility to ensure every team member has an equal opportunity to succeed, to be heard, to exchange ideas openly, to build lasting relationships, and to do the work of their life. Best of all, you will be able to feel deep pride in the work you do, because your contribution helps us make the world better than we found it. And for that, you’ll be loved by us, our customers, and the world in which we live. Accommodation Docusign is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our job application procedures. If you need such an accommodation, or a religious accommodation, during the application process, please contact us at accommodations@docusign.com. If you experience any issues, concerns, or technical difficulties during the application process please get in touch with our Talent organization at taops@docusign.com for assistance. Applicant and Candidate Privacy Notice Show more Show less Seniority level Not Applicable Employment type Full-time Job function Engineering and Information Technology Industries Software Development Referrals increase your chances of interviewing at Docusign by 2x See who you know

jobs.title: Software Engineer
jobs.description: Software Engineer Docusign Bengaluru, Karnataka, India 1 day ago 164 applicants See who Docusign has hired for this role Apply Join or sign in to find your next job Join to apply for the Software Engineer role at Docusign Email or phone Password Show Forgot password? Sign in Sign in with Email or New to LinkedIn? Join now By clicking Continue to join or sign in, you agree to LinkedIn’s User Agreement , Privacy Policy , and Cookie Policy . Save Report this job Company Overview Docusign brings agreements to life. Over 1.5 million customers and more than a billion people in over 180 countries use Docusign solutions to accelerate the process of doing business and simplify people’s lives. With intelligent agreement management, Docusign unleashes business-critical data that is trapped inside of documents. Until now, these were disconnected from business systems of record, costing businesses time, money, and opportunity. Using Docusign’s Intelligent Agreement Management platform, companies can create, commit, and manage agreements with solutions created by the #1 company in e-signature and contract lifecycle management (CLM). What you'll do We are looking for a Software Engineer with a blend of back and front-end experience to join our Strategic Partner Integration team. In this role you will own the full development lifecycle—designing, building, testing, and deploying product features for Docusign’s enterprise solutions. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams to modernize and scale complex, micro-service-based cloud integrations in an agile, fast-paced environment. By challenging the status quo on architecture and processes, you will help build enterprise-grade, highly reliable, and scalable cloud services. Your work will directly contribute to Docusign’s top priority: bringing Intelligent Agreement Management to large enterprise customers. This position is an individual contributor role reporting to the Manager, Software Engineering. Responsibility Design, implement, and maintain high-quality software applications using C#, .net, ASP.Net, JavaScript, Node.js, and TypeScript, ensuring optimal performance and user experience Create robust architecture and design patterns for scalable applications, ensuring code reusability and maintainability Ensure code health through continuous refactoring and proactive management of technical debt Collaborate with Product and Design to translate requirements into scalable technical designs Write comprehensive automated tests to maintain a high bar for software quality Participate in code reviews and contribute to the team’s technical documentation Identify and resolve technical issues and bugs in a timely manner, ensuring minimal disruption to development workflows Research and evaluate new technologies, frameworks, and tools to enhance development practices and drive innovation continuously Participate in on-call rotation Job Designation Hybrid: Employee divides their time between in-office and remote work. Access to an office location is required. (Frequency: Minimum 2 days per week; may vary by team but will be weekly in-office expectation) Positions at Docusign are assigned a job designation of either In Office, Hybrid or Remote and are specific to the role/job. Preferred job designations are not guaranteed when changing positions within Docusign. Docusign reserves the right to change a position's job designation depending on business needs and as permitted by local law. What you bring Basic A Computer Science degree or a related technical field 4+ years of professional experience in software development, specializing in C#, .net, JavaScript, Node.js, and TypeScript Hands on skills in both frontend and backend development, capable of building and maintaining scalable applications Deep Knowledge of Data Structures and Algorithms Familiar with various design patterns and architectural principles, enabling the creation of maintainable and reusable code Experience working in Agile environments, contributing to iterative development and continuous improvement processes Hands-on experience with micro-service based system architecture, including RESTful API design Experience building large enterprise scale cloud services Experience with git, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud-native deployment (containers/Kubernetes) Preferred 6+ years of experience in shipping large scale cloud-based products Experience designing and shipping production-grade, end-to-end integration solutions across large-scale, cloud-based enterprise ecosystems for Large Enterprise Customers Experience with .Net/C#/ASP.NET Core Experience with React/Javascript/TypeScript, Angular, or similar modern JS frameworks accepted Experience in Azure Technology stack like Azure Kubernetes, CosmosDB, Azure EventHub, Experience with Modern AI Agentic Coding tools like Claude Code/Github Copilot/Cursor Experience working in Globally Distributed team with different time zones including remote teams Excellent written and verbal communication skills Life at Docusign Working here Docusign is committed to building trust and making the world more agreeable for our employees, customers and the communities in which we live and work. You can count on us to listen, be honest, and try our best to do what’s right, every day. At Docusign, everything is equal. We each have a responsibility to ensure every team member has an equal opportunity to succeed, to be heard, to exchange ideas openly, to build lasting relationships, and to do the work of their life. Best of all, you will be able to feel deep pride in the work you do, because your contribution helps us make the world better than we found it. And for that, you’ll be loved by us, our customers, and the world in which we live. Accommodation Docusign is committed to providing reasonable accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities in our job application procedures. If you need such an accommodation, or a religious accommodation, during the application process, please contact us at accommodations@docusign.com. If you experience any issues, concerns, or technical difficulties during the application process please get in touch with our Talent organization at taops@docusign.com for assistance.
